title: PharmaTrack Pro
subtitle: Pharmaceutical Inventory Platform
description: Enterprise pharma management with POS terminal, JWT multi-role auth, GXP PDF reporting, and real-time analytics.
longDescription: PharmaTrack Pro is a comprehensive Pharmaceutical Inventory Management System built with Java Spring Boot 3.x backend and React 19 frontend. Features multi-role JWT authentication (Admin, Manager, Pharmacist), a full-featured POS terminal with GST calculation, smart stock alerts, supplier management, analytics dashboards, and GXP-compliant PDF/CSV exports deployed on AWS EC2.

techSpecs.authMethod: JWT with role-based access (Admin / Manager / Pharmacist)

features.title: Multi-Role JWT Auth
features.desc: Admin, Manager, Pharmacist with Spring Security filter chains

features.title: POS Terminal
features.desc: Full POS with GST calculation, cart management, and receipt generation

features.title: Analytics Dashboard
features.desc: Revenue insights, stock trends, and supplier performance metrics

features.title: GXP-Compliant Reports
features.desc: PDF reports meeting pharmaceutical compliance standards

features.title: Smart Alerts
features.desc: Low stock, expiry, and reorder notifications

features.title: Supplier Management
features.desc: Vendor tracking, purchase orders, and supply chain

title: Bakery Inventory System
subtitle: Full-Stack Inventory Management
description: Secure REST APIs, JWT auth, Redux state management, and Spring Data JPA for bakery stock and order management.
longDescription: A full-stack bakery management application with Spring Boot REST API, JWT authentication, React frontend with Redux Toolkit state management, and MySQL database. Features inventory tracking, role-based access, order management, and reporting.

features.title: Product Catalog
features.desc: Dynamic product management with categories and pricing

features.title: Order Processing
features.desc: Complete order lifecycle from creation to delivery

features.title: Low-Stock Alerts
features.desc: Automated alerts when ingredient levels fall below threshold

title: Expense Splitter
subtitle: Automated Group Settlement App
description: Automated balance settlement for shared expenses with user groups and JWT-secured REST APIs.
longDescription: A Spring Boot + ReactJS application for splitting group expenses. Features user group management, expense tracking, automatic debt settlement calculation, and JWT-secured REST APIs with MySQL persistence.

features.title: Group Management
features.desc: Create groups, add members, manage shared expenses

features.title: Smart Splitting
features.desc: Debt simplification algorithm minimizes transactions

features.title: Settlement Tracking
features.desc: Mark settlements and view history

title: Secure Journal Web App
subtitle: Cloud-Persisted Personal Journal
description: Spring Security authentication, role-based access, and MongoDB Atlas cloud persistence for private journaling.
longDescription: A secure personal journaling web application built with Spring Boot, Spring Security for authentication, and MongoDB Atlas for cloud persistence. Features role-based access control, encrypted storage, and a clean REST API.

features.title: Secure Authentication
features.desc: Spring Security with form and basic auth

features.title: Cloud Persistence
features.desc: MongoDB Atlas for reliable cloud storage

features.title: Role-Based Access
features.desc: Granular permissions per user role

title: Group Chat Web App
subtitle: Real-Time Messaging Backend
description: RESTful group messaging backend with Spring Boot. Built during internship at Ardent Computech Pvt. Ltd.
longDescription: A real-time group chat web application developed as a team project during internship at Ardent Computech. Features WebSocket-based messaging, user registration, group creation, and persistence. I was responsible for the Spring Boot backend and REST API design.

features.title: Real-Time Messaging
features.desc: WebSocket-based instant messaging

features.title: Group Rooms
features.desc: Create and join multiple group chat rooms

features.title: Message History
features.desc: Persistent message history with database storage

title: EV Charging Network Patent
subtitle: Patent No. 202531058380 · Granted 2025
description: Patented geolocation model for optimizing EV charging station networks. Spring Boot backend, REST APIs.
longDescription: Granted Indian Patent (No. 202531058380) for an innovative Integrated Geolocation Model for Electric Vehicle Charging Networks. I developed the backend system using Java Spring Boot REST APIs to support geolocation-based charging station discovery, reservation, and billing.

features.title: Geolocation Model
features.desc: Discovers nearest EV charging stations via GPS

features.title: Smart Reservation
features.desc: Real-time station availability and slot booking

features.title: Automated Billing
features.desc: Usage-based billing integrated with reservations
